name: io.github.olo-dot-io/Uni-CLI
description: Self-repairing CLI catalog that exposes 238 websites, desktop apps, and external CLIs as one MCP server. 925 declarative YAML adapters; structured error envelopes let agents fix failing adapters at runtime and retry.

environmentVariables.name: UNICLI_MCP_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Tool profile: default (4 meta-tools), expanded (one tool per command), or computer-use
